ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 28th April 2026, 2:00 AM – 4:00 AM IST
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Friday, 28th April 2026 from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM IST. During this window, remote access will be unavailable.

To minimize disruption:
1. Plan your work accordingly and save any unsaved data before the maintenance window.
2. If you need urgent access during maintenance, please request a temporary VPN exception through the IT Service Portal.

For detailed instructions and troubleshooting, visit <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

This is an official notification from the Microsoft 365 security team. Your password is set to expire on 30th April 2026. If you do not update your password within 48 hours, your account will be deactivated and you will lose access to all corporate data and services.

To update your password, please follow the link below and complete the verification process:

<URL>

For assistance, contact the IT helpdesk at it-support@company.com.

Dhanyavaad for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
